## createDataToSend

Create array included telegram objects

### Parameters

*   `data` **[Object][6]** separated object by type

### Examples

```javascript
[
 [
  {
    type: "video",
    media: "ReadStream",
  }
 ],
 [
  {
    type: "image",
    media: 'https:yadisk.com...',
  },
  {
    type: "image",
    media: 'https:yadisk.com...'
  }
 ]
]
```

Returns **[Array][7]**&#x20;

## sendDataToTg

Send files blocks to telegram chat

### Parameters

*   `dataBlocks` **[Array][7]** array of telegram data to send
